properties.name: mill.services.public-base-url
properties.description: Public base URL used to generate external links in application descriptors

properties.name: mill.application.hosts.externals
properties.description: Named externally reachable service addresses (e.g. http, grpc-request). Field values may use @request.scheme, @request.host, @request.port (quote in YAML). Resolved per HTTP request by ExternalHostsProvider.
